titleStmt.title: SII 38.362: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 362. (A.R. No. 362 of 1912.) DĒVIKĀPURAM, ARNI TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the north wall, first prākāra, Bṛihadāmba temple.

p.hi: King: Kṛishṇadeva-Mahārāya Year: Śaka 1444, Vṛisha, Friday.

summary.p: Badly engraved. Records that a lady Dēvayiri Ammaṉ, daughter of Dēvappuḍaiyār of Marudaraspaḍaivīḍu, made a gift of lamp to the god Tirumalari-uḍaiyanayinār in Dēvakkāpuram, a dēvasthāṉam in Murugamaṅgalappaṟṟu. It seems that two shepherds were to supply oil for the lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
cuvattiśrī ma(ma)ṉ makāmaṇṭalecura metiṉi micura kaṇṭa kaṭṭāri
cāḷuvak kraṣṇaya tevamakārāyar piṟutivirācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa
cakāttam 144 10 4 mel cella(ā) niṉṟa viṣaRead vṛṣavaruṣattu tecamiyum cukkiṟa
vāramum peṟṟanāḷ murukamaṅkalappaṟṟu tevastāṉam tevakkāpuram
Uṭaiyaār tirumalaruṭaiyanayiṉāṟku marutaracarpaṭaiviṭṭu tevappuṭaiyar
kumārattiyār tevayiriammaṉ tammiṭavum Umpiḷakkai Ūril tammuṭaiya taṉmamāka
tiruviḷakkukkum Āka viṭṭa I nattattil maṉṟāṭi tevarkkoṉmakaṉ (makaṉ) Āṭkoṇṭāṉ
kku viḷakku neyikkaṭaiyak koṉmakaṉ kamaṉāṇṭai vaka vima(k)kku Aṟakku neyi 3
Āka kku varuṣam 1kku Aḷakku neyi 1ku Inta teva kāṇiyum tirukkāttikaikku Aḷantu
cukattile Irukkavum Inta taṉmattukku Akitampaṇṇiṉavarkaḷ keṅkaikaraiyile kāraāmpacuvai
koṉṟa pāvattile pokakaṭavarkaḷākavum Ikkalveṭṭu Eḻutiṉamaikku koyilkaṇakku
Ūṟtaṇṭuvanaṇṭār Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 38.362 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
